title: Special buses operate to Tiruppur after polls

title: Polling concludes, voters await results
summary: Polling has concluded in Tiruppur constituencies with steady turnout, and residents are now awaiting official election results announcement in coming days.

title: Heatwave conditions persist in Tiruppur
summary: High temperatures continue across Tiruppur, affecting outdoor work and daily routines, with health officials advising precautions against heat-related illnesses.

title: Hospitals report dehydration cases rise
summary: Local hospitals are seeing increased cases of dehydration and heat exhaustion as Tiruppur faces ongoing extreme summer temperatures.

title: Textile sector eyes recovery post-election
summary: Tiruppur garment manufacturers expect improved business activity after election disruptions, though cost pressures continue to affect profitability.

title: Waste management issues raised again
summary: Residents highlighted ongoing garbage disposal problems in Tiruppur outskirts, urging authorities to improve waste collection and processing systems.

title: Road repair works resume across city
summary: Municipal authorities resumed road repair projects in Tiruppur after election restrictions were lifted, focusing on damaged urban stretches.

title: Markets reopen with steady footfall
summary: Retail markets in Tiruppur reported moderate customer turnout as business activity gradually returned to normal after polling day slowdown.

title: Police maintain post-election vigilance
summary: Security has been tightened in Tiruppur with police maintaining surveillance in sensitive areas following completion of polling process.

title: Traffic returns to normal levels
summary: Vehicle movement across Tiruppur roads has normalized after election-related restrictions, with no major congestion reported.

title: Schools reopen after polling break
summary: Educational institutions in Tiruppur resumed regular classes following temporary closures for election arrangements.

title: Groundwater pollution concerns persist
summary: Environmental groups reiterated concerns over groundwater contamination in Tiruppur due to industrial waste and improper disposal practices.

title: Yarn price fluctuations impact industry
summary: Volatile yarn prices continue to challenge Tiruppur garment manufacturers, affecting production planning and export competitiveness.

title: Streetlight maintenance underway
summary: Corporation teams have begun repairing faulty streetlights in multiple Tiruppur wards to improve nighttime safety conditions.

title: Workers return to factories
summary: Textile workers resumed duties across Tiruppur industrial units following election-related holidays, restoring production activities.

title: Drainage cleaning operations resume
summary: Municipal teams restarted drainage cleaning work across key zones in Tiruppur to prevent clogging ahead of monsoon season.

title: Dry weather expected to continue
summary: Forecast indicates continued dry conditions in Tiruppur with no immediate rainfall, raising concerns for water availability.

title: Farmers voice irrigation concerns
summary: Farmers in Tiruppur district expressed worries over water scarcity impacting irrigation and crop sustainability amid prolonged dry spell.
